languages.text: {n}Генетор важно кивает.{/n} "Достойная задача. Лишь статистика, собранная с достаточным прилежанием, может обеспечить базис для заслуживающих внимания гипотез".
{n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."
languages.original_text: {n}Генетор важно кивает.{/n} "Достойная задача. Лишь статистика, собранная с достаточным прилежанием, может обеспечить базис для заслуживающих внимания гипотез".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."
{n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavor. Statistics is the mother of all hypotheses, especially when compiled with due diligence."
{n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."
{n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."
{n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."

languages.text: {n}El genetor asiente con seriedad.{/n} «Un esfuerzo digno. Solo los datos estadísticos, combinados con una diligencia suficiente, pueden servir como base para una hipótesis digna de consideración».
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."

traits.locale_text: {n}El genetor asiente con seriedad.{/n} «Un esfuerzo digno. Solo los datos estadísticos, combinados con una diligencia suficiente, pueden servir como base para una hipótesis digna de consideración».

languages.text: {n}基因士严肃地点了点头。{/n}“这份努力很有价值。只有在足够严谨的统计数据之上，才可能建立起值得讨论的假说。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."

traits.locale_text: {n}基因士严肃地点了点头。{/n}“这份努力很有价值。只有在足够严谨的统计数据之上，才可能建立起值得讨论的假说。”

languages.text: {n}Der Genetor nickt ernsthaft.{/n} "Ein würdiges Streben. Allein mit der gebotenen Sorgfalt erhobene statistische Daten können als Fundament einer belastbaren Hypothese dienen."
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Genetor nickt ernsthaft.{/n} "Ein würdiges Streben. Allein mit der gebotenen Sorgfalt erhobene statistische Daten können als Fundament einer belastbaren Hypothese dienen."
{n}Der Genetor nickt ernsthaft.{/n} "Ein würdiges Streben. Statistik ist die Mutter aller Hypothesen, wenn man entsprechende Sorgfalt walten lässt."

languages.text: {n}Le genetor acquiesce d'un air grave.{/n} « Excellente initiative. Seules les données statistiques, si on les utilise intelligemment, peuvent servir de base à une hypothèse digne de considération. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le genetor acquiesce d'un air grave.{/n} « Excellente initiative. Seules les données statistiques, si on les utilise intelligemment, peuvent servir de base à une hypothèse digne de considération. »

languages.text: {n}Genetör ciddiyetle başını sallıyor.{/n} "Değerli bir çaba. Yalnızca yeterli özenle derlenmiş istatistiksel veriler, dikkate değer hipotezler için temel oluşturabilir."
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetör ciddiyetle başını sallıyor.{/n} "Değerli bir çaba. Yalnızca yeterli özenle derlenmiş istatistiksel veriler, dikkate değer hipotezler için temel oluşturabilir."

languages.text: {n}ジェネトルが頷きながら言った。{/n}「立派な試みだ。統計学はあらゆる仮説の母であり、特に十分な注意を払って集められた統計学はそうである。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor nods gravely.{/n} "A worthy endeavour. Only statistical data, when compiled with sufficient diligence, can serve as the foundation for hypotheses worthy of consideration."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジェネトルが頷きながら言った。{/n}「立派な試みだ。統計学はあらゆる仮説の母であり、特に十分な注意を払って集められた統計学はそうである。」
